title: tirucalia perpera
side_effects: Tirucalia perpera can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of alkaloids. Ingesting large amounts of the plant's extract can also cause vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach cramps. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to kidney and liver damage, as well as an increased risk of seizures and respiratory failure. Furthermore, improper use of Tirucalia perpera can also interact with other medications, exacerbating their side effects and potentially leading to life-threatening conditions.
